response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed from start to finish. The dialogue was identified between 00:00 and 03:31. A transition sequence occurred between 03:31 and 04:08. The main song, 'ALL FOR ONE' by Hololive English, was identified starting at 04:08. I performed a search for '"All For One" Hololive English lyrics' to retrieve the lyrics. The song is in English.
response.global_summary: The video consists of a dialogue sequence between VTubers Hakos Baelz and Ninomae Ina'nis, followed by a vocal performance of the concert theme song, "ALL FOR ONE," by the Hololive English group.

scenes.description: Dialogue between Hakos Baelz and Ninomae Ina'nis on stage.
A visual intro sequence showcasing different characters, transitioning into the main performance.
Performance of the song 'ALL FOR ONE' by Hololive English, with on-screen text indicating the concert title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ooh~ 
Just look around and see—it's so incredible! 
So many smiles in a sea of light 
Take one step with me and you'll be dazzled, 
There's magic in the air tonight 
The hours zoom, zoom, zoom, 
My heart goes boom, boom, boom 
The world is brighter because you believe in...
